scripts.build:export:preview: cargo run -p gcs-desktop --bin gcs-desktop -- export-preview export-artifacts/html5-preview
scripts.build:export:preview:nes: cargo run -p gcs-desktop --bin gcs-desktop -- export-preview export-artifacts/html5-preview --profile nes
scripts.build:export:preview:snes: cargo run -p gcs-desktop --bin gcs-desktop -- export-preview export-artifacts/html5-preview --profile snes
scripts.build:export:preview:native: cargo run -p gcs-desktop --bin gcs-desktop -- export-preview export-artifacts/html5-preview
scripts.test:e2e:metrics: node scripts/playwright-metrics.mjs --input test-results/playwright-report.json --out test-results/playwright-metrics.md --append "../../docs/testing/Flaky Test Log.md"
scripts.test:e2e:export:gb: npm run build:export:preview && playwright test --config=playwright.config.mjs tests-e2e/export-parity.spec.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:export:nes: npm run build:export:preview:nes && playwright test --config=playwright.config.mjs tests-e2e/export-parity.spec.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:export:snes: npm run build:export:preview:snes && playwright test --config=playwright.config.mjs tests-e2e/export-parity.spec.mjs
